div.span:
include/server/server_handler.hpp: ServiceHandler::ServiceHandler()
- Initialize Unsupported markdown: codespan by Unsupported markdown: codespan: include/osrm/osrm.hpp: OSRM()
- All services(route, table, nearest, trip, match, tile) will be handled by the same Unsupported markdown: codespan

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
div.span:
include/server/server.hpp: Server::CreateServer()
- Create server instance (listen socket)
- async_accpet then invoke Unsupported markdown: codespan after accept

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
div.span:
include/server/server.hpp: Server::Run() by mulitple threads
- based on boost::asio

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
div.span:
include/osrm/osrm.hpp: OSRM()
- Create CH or MLD engine, initialize by EngineConfig

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
div.span:
include/server/connection.hpp: Connection()
- Create a peer connection object, read, handle, write

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
div.span:
include/engine/engine.hpp: Engine()
- Create all plugins: route, table, nearest, tile, match, trip.
- create Unsupported markdown: codespan by Algorithm

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
div.span:
include/engine/plugins/viaroute.hpp: ViaRoutePlugin()
- viaroute.hpp: HandleRequest() is the real routing calculate function

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
div.span:
include/engine/plugins/table.hpp: TablePlugin()
- table.hpp: HandleRequest() is the real table calculate function
e.g. many-to-many routing

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
div.span:
include/engine/datafacade/process_memory_allocator.hpp: ProcessMemoryAllocator()
- Construct Unsupported markdown: codespan in memory and load mapdata into it
(will see obviously memory increase in this step)
